title: ProposeTradesOutput
description: Structured output for an AI agent's daily trading decisions. Every trade must include a stop-loss level.

trades.description: List of proposed trades for today. Empty array means HOLD (no action).

action.description: BUY to open a new position or add to existing. SELL to close or reduce a position.

ticker.description: Stock ticker symbol (e.g., AAPL, SPY, QQQ). Must be a US stock with price >= $5 or a US ETF.

allocation_pct.description: For BUY: percentage of total portfolio value to allocate (5-25%). For SELL: percentage of the position to sell (use 100 to close entirely).

order_type.description: MARKET: execute at next open. LIMIT: execute only if price <= limit_price.

limit_price.description: Required if order_type is LIMIT. The maximum price you are willing to pay (BUY) or minimum price to accept (SELL).

stop_loss_pct.description: For BUY orders: percentage below entry price to set the stop-loss (e.g., 10 means stop at -10%). System-enforced, non-overridable.

take_profit_pct.description: Optional. Percentage above entry price to set take-profit (e.g., 20 means sell at +20%).

reason.description: Brief explanation of the trade thesis. Used for strategy adherence analysis.

daily_notes.description: Brief market outlook and portfolio commentary for the day. Helps track strategic consistency.

portfolio_review.description: Optional review of existing positions. Note any positions you considered selling but decided to hold.

action.description: HOLD: keeping position. WATCH: monitoring closely for potential exit.
